meaning: n.邮票,印花,印,图章,标志,印记,跺脚,顿足v.跺(脚),顿(足),压印
examples: A commemorative stamp will be issued October 15.
He says he'll have no problem authenticating the stamp.
He stuck a stamp on the envelope.
John Garamendi, the California insurance commissioner, puts a stamp of approval on life insurers.
Cavalli has also put his stamp on the kitchen with twists on Italian classics.
